reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Very bad for 4 star

reviews.title: Ok, but not a 4 star hotel
reviews.positives:
-Laundry service excellent and inexpensive. 
-Housekeeping excellent.
-room service excellent 
-bellmen and front desk staff helpful
reviews.negatives:
-Heater was not working first night.  They fixed it. 
Only one thin blanket.  Slept in robe second night
-not enough lighting in the room and electrical receptacle below the picture is missing socket. 
-no wash cloths.  Only 2 bath towels, two hand towels and a tiny bath mat for two adults daily.  
-shower/tub hard for elderly to get in and out of.
-mattress was lumpy. Not comfortable 
-WiFi is weak signal, keeps dropping or does not exist.  
-massage was closed due to Tet
-picture window dirty
-breakfast is Vietnamese style, not Western style.  One small toaster oven. The last morning there was a new toaster 
-Refrigerator was not working.  Fixed after several complaints. The refrigerator repairman put all my sodas in the freezer and they froze solid 
-no shop to buy sodas or sundries

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
I stayed here two nights. I am so disappointed as the ranking star of hotel is 4 stars but actually it is 2 stars. Facilities are too old, all
materials are very old. Towels are
not clean. I will not recommend for this hotel as the price is expensive, it charged 179$ for two nights.

reviews.title: Last minute  booking
reviews.text:
Due to being screwed over by another hotel I was forced last minute to find alternative accommodation for the night. Saigon ban me was handy and visible so chose this for the night. The room is very basic but the overall hotel looks run down with wall paper coming off the walls. Very dated rooms and uncomfortable bed.
There is was little to no choice for breakfast  so I was not happy with my stay. When I went to book out I sat in the lobby waiting for them to give me the all clear which is standard. The staff didn't even bother to tell me anything so after 30 minutes I had to approach reception where they said all is good. I would not recommend this hotel at all.

reviews.title: Maybe OK
reviews.text:
The Saigon Hotel should own 3 stars.
It is big and the same applies for the rooms but that is it.

Very poor design, The carpet in my room was having cigarette burns.
The furniture are poor and the bed was bad. 

You will waste a lot of time waiting the elevators. (I was sometime waiting for more than 7 minutes) 

The hotel service gets about 7 out of 10. 
The restaurant menu was also very poor.
Breakfast gets also 7 out of 10.

The location is good. 

Overall score: 70 top.

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: Located right in the center of Buon Ma Thuot, next to the roundabout with the symbolic tank representing the liberation of the city. Opposite is the central church and the cultural center; if you are here on the weekend, it will be a wonderful experience to listen to the church choir singing and the cultural performances of the Central Highlands every weekend evening.

reviews.title: Recommended
reviews.text:
I stayed at Saigon Ban Me Hotel in Buon Ma Thuot, Vietnam, and had a very pleasant experience.

The hotel is in a perfect location, making it easy to explore the city and access nearby restaurants, cafes, and attractions. It’s very convenient for both short stays and longer visits.

The staff were excellent—friendly, professional, and always ready to assist. Their great service truly made my stay more comfortable and enjoyable.

The room was also very clean and well-maintained, which I really appreciated.

Overall, I highly recommend Saigon Ban Me Hotel for its great location, clean rooms, and outstanding staff service.

reviews.title: Khách sạn Ok
reviews.text:
Khách sạn nằm ở khu vực trung tâm, rất thuận tiện đi lại. 
Phòng rộng sạch sẽ, nhân viên dọn phòng chăm chút và chu đáo dọn dẹp đồ cho khách. 
Nhân viên lễ tân, bellboy, bảo vệ, nhiệt tình tư vấn các địa điểm du lịch. 
Chỉ có duy nhất chị quản lý nhà ăn tầng 2 hay cáu gắt và không hỗ trợ khách khi đồ dùng đựng đồ ăn có vấn đề

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The hotel is centrally located, which makes it very convenient for getting around. However, the surroundings can be quite noisy, and the air conditioning is also loud. The breakfast is decent, though nothing exceptional. Overall, the facilities and room interiors are quite dated, but the location is a definite advantage.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is located in the center of BMT city. Overall is good but the facility is a bit old.

reviews.title: Excellent location
reviews.text: Excellent location. Lovely, helpful staff. Comfortable large bed and pillows. Good size rooms. Shower in the bath so you have to be able to get in and out of it. Near good places to eat.

reviews.title: Traveling for work alone
reviews.text: The location is quite convenient, opposite the church and the television station, with a beautiful view. It is situated in the center.

reviews.title: Needs updating
reviews.text: The hotel is very old. Everything is worn out. Swimming pool was dirty and many broken tiles. Only good points being location and room size. We moved to Elephant hotel after one night

reviews.title: Might be back
reviews.text:
We traveled as a group of 4 (2 adults and 2 kids) so the triple room was just perfect for us.
The room is basically clean and nice city view. Staff are friendly, especially f&b service staff who were very attentive tentative.
The hotel should arrange more small tables for small group (2-4 people). On the day we stayed, the hotel was full and we could barely find a table for ourselves and had to ask to share table with someone else. I am not quite happy with it.
The drain along the kid swimming pool is filled with small rocks, which looks nice but quite dangerous. When we were there with our kids, there was a little one picking up the rock/stones and threw in the swimming pool. At that time, we had to ask him to stop before he could hurt other kids. My little nephew found quite a few stones in the pool. So I think these rocks/ stones should be removed for guest’s safety.
Also there is a hangover piece of concrete in kid pool which could be potential hazard. Kids coming out of water without noticing could hit their head.
Its location is just perfect. Easy to get around and lot of coffee shops, restaurants and shopping places.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good hotel in the heart of the city , neat n clean rooms best in buon ma thout

reviews.title: Close to the center, convenient for transportation.
reviews.text: The hotel is conveniently located near the center for shuttle transportation. The staff is friendly. I will return when I have the chance.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Saigon Ban Me hotel is a large hotel with a long-standing tradition and is located in a very prime location right in the center of Buon Ma Thuot city, with full amenities. We stayed here for one night at a reasonable price and were comfortable. However, there is one thing we felt dissatisfied with, which is that the hotel towels are old and discolored, giving a "porridge" color, which creates an unclean feeling for guests. It's a pity that a large hotel like SG Ban Me has such oversights. We hope that the hotel management will address this issue soon.

reviews.title: Worth the money.
reviews.text: Beautiful location, delicious breakfast buffet. Especially the bed is very spacious, and even with a baby lying in it, it's still very comfortable.

reviews.title: The room is very good at Saigon Ban Me hotel.
reviews.text: We are a group of 6 people, the room is very good, well-equipped and clean.. the location of the hotel is very good.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Breakfast is good ,staff friendly.Good location

reviews.title: Stay at Sai Gon Ban Me hotel in Feb 2026
reviews.text:
- Location: excellent, right at the heart of Buon Me Thuot city center
- Staff:  good
- Service:  good
- Breakfast buffet: Asian and locals
- Facilities: all were in good condition, except the elevators were a bit slow.
- Cleanliness: acceptable
---> The hotel management board should consider to change all new towels and pillows in all rooms. 
All the face towels and bath towels were extremely old. They had turned yellow and had a very strong unpleasant detergent smell. 
Meanwhile, the pillows were too old and had flattened out of theirs original shapes, affecting the quality of sleep.

Overall, it was value for money if you could book this accommodation at the most affordable room price.

reviews.title: Relaxation of the mind at work
reviews.text: Our family had a comfortable and pleasant vacation at the Sai Gon Ban Me hotel. The Ban Me Sai Gon is old and has deteriorated since it was built a long time ago, but we still felt comfortable.

reviews.title: Great Location!
reviews.text: My family has stayed here several times...we keep coming back for more! We have had only one negative experience and that was the elevator kept losing electricity and we would get stuck for a few minutes...other than that...we like the hotel.

reviews.title: Feedback about the hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is located in a beautiful central location, the reception is friendly and provides quick assistance.

reviews.title: NICE PLACE

reviews.title: Wonderful facility
reviews.text: One of the best hotels in Buon Me Thout. Very spacious, clean, friendly staff, and a nice relaxing pool outdoors

reviews.title: Extremely beautiful hotel in Buon Ma Thuot.
reviews.text: I stayed here during my recent summer travel. I was very satisfied with my stay. The hotel is conveniently located for getting around the city, the rooms are clean, and the staff here are very enthusiastic when I needed guidance on where to go and eat.

reviews.title: Awesome
reviews.text: The hotel is right in the center, convenient for getting around, rooms are spacious and clean, breakfast is okay. Reasonable prices. I always stay here when I come to BMT.

reviews.title: Saigon Ban Me
reviews.text: Location is convenient. Facilities are ok, but not very good.

reviews.title: Good impression when arriving in Buon Ma Thuot.
reviews.text: The service and staff attitude are very good.

reviews.title: great hotel
reviews.text: Convenient location right in the center, amenities.

reviews.title: It's good if left across the street.
reviews.text: Located in a convenient area for passing travelers. If you choose a hotel to stay for a longer time and have more experiences, it's worth considering.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great location and good service.  Strongly recommend

reviews.title: Hotels worth trying here!
reviews.text: The hotel's location is very convenient as it is right at the six-way intersection, making it easy to walk to many attractions such as the Cathedral, the Children's Palace, and the market! The rooms are clean and of reasonable size, providing a comfortable feeling! The amenities are quite adequate, but there could still be upgrades to better meet the guests' needs! One area that needs improvement is the breakfast buffet, which has quite a limited selection for guests to choose from!

reviews.title: A well-established hotel on the church side.
reviews.text: I stayed for one night on a business trip in a hotel with a traditional design. The room's lighting was on the dim side, and the furniture and bathroom had an old-fashioned feel, but they were clean, and there were no particular issues during my stay. The front desk staff were friendly, and they handled luggage storage and other services well. The breakfast offered a variety of options, including the famous noodles, and the Vietnamese coffee was also good.

reviews.title: Prime location
reviews.text: The hotel is located right at the roundabout, Victory Monument. The surrounding area is bustling, next to the hotel is a market. There are many restaurants, and the rooms are clean and quiet. If I have a chance to return to Buon Ma Thuot, I will still stay at this hotel.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is located right in the center of Tank Junction 6, bustling. It is no more than 2 km to famous tourist spots in the city. The hotel is rated 4 stars, with relatively decent furnishings. The swimming pool is large, and there is a hot tub, but it seems to have not been cared for or maintained regularly, so it is quite dirty. When you step down, you will see dirt, many leaves, and dead insects floating in the pool. I didn't dare to swim. If the pool were well-taken care of on a regular basis, I think it would be a very worthwhile place to stay when visiting Buon Ma Thuot.

reviews.title: Best hotel
reviews.text: It is a really good hotel. The location is great. The local market, Vincom Plaza, is right in front, and there is a Korean restaurant nearby as well. It's the best~~

reviews.title: Compared to Meongtan..
reviews.text: The hotel is not much different from Mungthang. The facilities and the view are quite similar. Oh! The breakfast is definitely not as good compared to Mungthang ^^ Just keep this in mind.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean, comfortable, and the staff are friendly and enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Good

reviews.title: Best of my trip

reviews.title: Back here again
reviews.text: This is my second time staying here . First time was in 2019 . 5 years and I am back . I still prefer this hotel as the rooms are clean and there are many road side shops available within walking distance . If you are hungry . Not to worry . There are many food options. I also love the toilet which is spacious in comparison to others

reviews.title: A really old an run-down hotel
reviews.text: I am surprised this hotel is 4 stars. The facility like gym/fitness center is an absolute disgrace. The room itself feels old and run down. Breakfast buffet is only half decent, but I could see the effort in rotating dishes and keeping them filled abundantly. This hotel serves the purpose of having a place to sleep and shower, but that's pretty much it. If you expect a real four-star experience, better luck somewhere else.

reviews.title: Bugs
reviews.text: I used the word “bugs” for title because I know many foreign travelers are terrified by corkroach, but unfortunately, there were those 2 little bugs in my friends’s room (I booked 2 rooms). My friends go rid of them & I was the one informed the Reception about this incident. They sent housekeeping up (when we’re out for dinner) & the housekeeper only took away 1 out of the 2. We only stayed 1 night & that’s really not a big deal for us, but I hope the hotel would really take a careful care of the rooms for the next guests.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms.Linh
We're apologies about your inconvenience when you staying at our hotel.
The information so necessary to improve our serviced in the future.
Thank you & Best Regard!

reviews.title: Probably the best in BMT but needs improvement
reviews.text: The room itself was very nice; quite large. The bedding was rather thin and the pillows hard. The breakfast was mediocre when compared to other places we stayed. There was even a roach in the bread basket one morning. Ugh!  And one morning the capaccino machine worked; the next it didn't. Given that Buon Ma Thuot isn't a large tourist area, the hotel is probably the best in town. I will say the young lady in the coffee shop was outstanding. We wanted to eat in the hotel the first night after a long drive from Saigon. We went to the restaurant only to find a large party. They told us to go to the ground floor where the only place to eat was the coffee shop. When we received the menu it wasn't satisfactory. But the waitress said we could order from the upstairs restaurant and she would go get the meals for us. Turned out to be a very good meal. We really appreciated her help!  Turned out to be a good evening all due to the young woman who went out of her way to serve us. Too bad the breakfast staff wasn't as helpful.
reviews.response:
Thanks for your review!.

We apology for this cause!

reviews.title: It's a little dirty

reviews.title: rooms and location is excellent
reviews.text: This is a 4-star hotel and the hotel itself, rooms and location is excellent. Where they are lacking is the education of some staff members, who do not seems committed to their job, and if there are many guests, they look exhausted already at 07:00. The selection of items for breakfast is on average with hotels in Vietnamese cities, however, the organization of it, is far from optimal. You definitely get some exercise, as the bread and butter is about 15 meters from the cuts one would normally use, only the cheese is within normal range. BMT is the capital of the coffee area of Vietnam and you get good coffee, but ice coffee is recommended, as it was no hot coffee - may some guests had turned off the electrical warmer! all in all  a very good and perhaps the best hotel in town. Pricing seems reasonable.
reviews.positives: Room , location and room rate is good

reviews.positives: Really comfortable beds, a bathtub with lots of warm water and great AC was wonderful after 10 days in surrounding areas.

reviews.title: Wonderful time
reviews.text:
My aim was to swim everyday in the swimming pool. But swimming 2km/day for six  days at an earlier hotel Vinpearl in Danang in an Olympic size swimming pool put me off swimming in this hotel.
We had three good nights although the hotel is very close to city traffic. We suspect the Wifi close by in our floor might have cause some loss of sleep. Strong Wifi signal is certainly a curse to good sleeping.
We enjoyed the breakfasts and the attentive and cooperative staff. The same applies to the staff at the registration desk. They are very friendly, honest and supportive. We were provided with all the things requested including a packet of black tea leaf which is not available at the hotel. The room was kept tidy and clean and all facilities were working as expected. The only thing we missed was the Australian TV network was not found even though it was listed in the programme list.
We enjoyed our stay at the Saigon Bame. It was a memorable stay.
reviews.positives: Cleanliness, excellent breakfast and friendly and attentive staff

reviews.title: Well located, clean hotel and helpful staff
reviews.positives: Location, c

reviews.title: Frienly Staff
reviews.positives: good location - clean room

reviews.title: Clean, Good food, Great location
reviews.text: We enjoyed our 1 night stay at the hotel. The service is great and the food was really good.  Centrally located and the hotel is 2 years old.
reviews.positives: Location, Friendly Service, New

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.positives: good location, clean room, good service

reviews.title: Pleasant. Centrally Located. Helpful Staff.
reviews.text:
Primarily catering to Vietnamese guests, the hotel services are oriented to this clientele. The staff are very eager and helpful ... if you can get their attention! Language is a bit of a problem, but somebody who speaks English is almost always close at hand.

Note that the breakfast buffet is entirely suited to the Vietnamese palate, and there are very few western (or even western-style) breakfast choices.
reviews.positives: Location, location, location.

reviews.title: A great place to stay!
reviews.text:
We booked for one night , but soon we decided to book an extra night! The hotel has nice and comfortable rooms, great bathtub and view! The staff arranged a motorbike and we made a great trip to lak lake and a bit beyond! It was amazing. A great tour. After 140km  motor biking, we enjoyed a great veggie dinner behind the central market, there is a spot to BBQ yourself, of course meat and fish is available, for non veggie people. The second day we also went for a motorbike trip! Again 140 km now in the direction of yon don national park again a great trip! Unfortunately we had to leave, after saying goodbye we went for the evening flight, after one hour we came back....the flight was cancelled! The staff was surprised but arranged a room directly! The breakfast Asian orientated but good! 

The ethnic museum of BMT is a great place to spend an hour and half!

We loved it!
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, swimming pool and big rooms!

reviews.title: Saigon Banme is closed by the Church, city and air
reviews.text: Good hotel,convenience access to civic center, service friendly...
reviews.positives: Good location, friendly, high speed internet connection
reviews.response: Thank you for your stay with us!

reviews.title: Best hotel in Buon Ma Thuot city
reviews.text: Great bathroom with both overhead shower, hot water and bathtub (big and clean) available - we enjoyed bubble bath every night! But the water is sometimes cold - need to constantly check the water temperature. Room is spacious and clean. King-sized bed is comfortable. A typical 4-star hotel based on international standard - nothing extraordinary but this hotel is probably the best you can find in Buon Ma Thuot city. The only other contender will be Dakruco Hotel, also a 4-star hotel. We tried both in our previous stays - and we felt Sai Gon Ban Me is better. The breakfast is so-so: the menu is the same everyday. Probably because not so many guests staying here, the breakfast does not have much variety. WiFi internet in rooms at extreme ends of the hotel floor may have weak signals - but you can always bring a laptop to the lobby and access WiFi from the sofa seats there.
reviews.positives: Location, Cleanliness, 4-Star

reviews.title: The hotel has a perfect location in the city
reviews.text: We had great experience while staying at this hotel. The room is clean with great view of the city. The hotel location is perfect with walking distance to church, wet market, victory statue, coffee shops etc. I would come back for next time.
reviews.positives: Brand new hotel, central location & nice city view
reviews.response: Hope you enjoy with our service!

reviews.title: Best hotel in Buon Ma Thuot
reviews.text: We were a young couple on our way to Nha Trang. We stayed for 4 nights and we really enjoyed our stay at this hotel. It's probably the best hotel (in terms of class, comfort and location) in Buon Ma Thuot city. However the Internet was a little bit slow. The view from the window is great - we could see as far as the mountains. We stayed on the 10th floor. This hotel is probably the tallest building in the area so the view from the window is really great. The breakfast is so-so: not so delicious and limited choice. But the hotel seems to be really quiet - not many visitors around so it is understandable that they scale down the buffet breakfast.
reviews.positives: Location, room comfort, large bathroom

reviews.title: Efficient and clean

reviews.title: Very new and modern hotel in the heart of Buon Ma
reviews.text: This Hotel is the ultimate one in Buon ma Thuot city. Very modern building and nice luxury lobby. Excellent location at the heart of downtown. The rooms are big and have very modern and nice furnitures. The premier suites are pretty big and make an excellent choice with a spectacular bathroom... The bad new is the hotel is almost empty... otherwise the staff is very friendly but quite unexperienced... Breakfast is just so so and at last this hotel seems to be much more dedicated to weddings parties than to house some tourists.
reviews.positives: Absolutely new. Modern style. Excellent location. Friendly staff

reviews.title: Das mit Abstand beste Hotel der Stadt
reviews.text: Der Aufenthalt war eine absolute Wohltat. Das Hotel ist sehr professionell, sauber und neu. Die Zimmer hatten mit Abstand die beste Qualität auf unserer Vietnam Reise: gute Klimaanlage, schöne große Betten, tolles Bad. Das Frühstücksbuffet war sehr groß, lässt aber doch eher Asiatische Herzen höher schlagen. Die Gäste bestehen überwiegend aus asiatischen Geschäftsleuten, was am Pool von Vorteil, im Speisesaal zum Nachteil ist.
reviews.positives: Lage, Zimmer, Pool

reviews.text: Pur essendo rimasto solamente 1 giorno sono stato molto contento del soggiorno per via della disponibilita' del personale a qualsiasi esigenza della clientela e tutto sommato l'albergo si trova in buona posizione e facile da raggiungere
reviews.positives: Personale, pulizia, disponibilita'

reviews.title: Fijn hotel, prachtige omgeving en top personeel!
reviews.text:
Geweldig verblijf, mooi hotel, prachtig zwembad en prima ontbijt.

De markt is zeer authentiek en een brommer huren ging prima via het hotel. Zeer moeite waard om een tocht buiten de stad te maken! Ook het ethnic museum vonden wij super.

Wij gaan zeker een keer terug komen!
reviews.positives: Zwembad, locatie, personeel

reviews.title: 市の中心で移動は便利
reviews.text:
バスタブ付きの部屋で、通りの逆側で静かでした。
風呂のお湯が、半分程溜まった時点で出なくなりました。気温は高いので、熱いお湯は不要でしたが、、、。
朝食は豪華です。珈琲が大変濃く、ぎゅうにぃうを半分以上混ぜて飲みました。

reviews.title: 部屋が汚い
reviews.text:
子供と2人で泊まりました。
子供のおもちゃがベットの下に入ってしまったので取ろうとすると、たくさんゴミが落ちてました。
少し怪しいゴミも落ちていたので、不安になりました。

フロントスタッフの方々が親切に色々教えてくれましたが、対応してくださってる途中でも、現地の言葉で雑談なのかな？ニヤニヤ笑ったりと、勤務態度があまりよろしくないです笑

徒歩圏内に大きなショッピングモールもあり、タクシーで1時間のところに像乗りができる場所や観光スポットがあるので、立地は良かったです。

reviews.title: 近くて良かった
reviews.text: 翌日、バンメトートに行く予定で、ホーチミンに着くのが22時過ぎだった。ホテルまでの行程や脚が痛く歩きにくいので、ホテルまで行くのが心配だったけれど、事前にメールで頼んだ通りの対応で有り難かった。

reviews.title: ロケーションがいい
reviews.text:
○ロケーションがいい。市場周辺に歩いて行ける
○Wi-Fi強い。水圧も強い
○スタッフは親切。タクシーの手配もスムーズだった

ホテルは古く、朝食も普通。しかしホテルステイを楽しむわけではないので、気にならない程度。

reviews.title: 4星だけどプールは水たまり
reviews.text:
ホテルの部屋には満足しましたがプールの中にはコケが生えており泳ぐ気はしませんでした
手入れが行き届けば良いホテルですので残念でした

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: ロケーション、部屋での快適さは良かったが、電気系統がNG。証明スイッチは手元に 集中していないし、コンセントがベッド周りやデスク周りにも無く、充電に不自由した。

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: 良くもなく悪くもないホーチミンのホテル比べたら安い

reviews.title: オムツ購入も、手助け頂き、ありがたかった
reviews.text: 施設、清潔感、ホスピタリティ言うこと無しです。強くお勧めします
reviews.response:
Dear Mr/Ms YASUNORI
Thank you for your comments
We hope see you soon in Buon Ma Thuot again
Have a nice day!

reviews.title: 快適
reviews.text:
6日間滞在しましたが、快適に過ごせました。市場やスーパーが近いなど、立地がいいので、色々勝手がいいです。ただ、夜は周辺飲食店の閉店が早いです。開いてても12時くらいまで。多分、バンメトート自体がそういう土地なんでしょうが...。
部屋自体は快適でしたが、カードキーの反応が芳しくなくドアの開閉などに手間がかかりました。他の部屋の方はそうでもなかったので、多分自分の部屋だけの不具合だと思いますが、そこが不満点です。

5階にちょっとした空中庭園があり、のんびりできる穴場です。
reviews.response:
Yes, next time for something wrong with your card key please do not hesitate to contact receptionist to change/replace for you.

Thanks for your review!

reviews.title: 便利な場所に立つローカルな高級ホテル
reviews.text: バンメトートはとても田舎なのに充分満足できるホテルでした。私達の泊まった部屋は高層階で、一面ガラス張りの窓からは、素晴らしい景色が望めました。部屋も広く清潔でスタッフも感じがよかったです。

reviews.title: ツアー紹介
reviews.text:
４つ星ホテルで英語対応もバッチリ。朝8時前に到着したにも関わらず、フロント横の旅行会社事務室を案内頂き、8時半からの当日ツアーに参加させて頂いた。

朝ご飯も大変美味しく、至極満足。

街の中心にあり、空港からタクシーで30分、12万ドン。

祝日て3連休中だったが50ドル少しでこのクオリティならばオススメです！

reviews.title: 立地、設備
reviews.text:
ホテルの場所はバンメトートの中心地にあり目の前に戦勝記念塔があり、バンメトートを探索するにはいい場所にある。
ホテルの部屋は十分に広く、綺麗で、よく掃除されており、アメニティーも十分揃っていた。
スタッフの対応もとても良く、フレンドリーで、良かった。
ジムの設備には少々がっかりしたが。プールはまあまあだった。
なにしろ、部屋、階上レストランからの眺めがよく、昼、夜共に眺望が楽しめた。
朝食は、バイキング式で、種類も多く楽しめた。オーダーでベトナム麺も無料だった。
